headline: Shareholder Activism Puts GE Israel Defense Contracts And ESG Risks In Focus
summary: JLens and the Anti Defamation League are urging GE Aerospace shareholders to vote against a proposal at the upcoming annual meeting. The proposal asks NYSE:GE to commission an independent report on its human rights and international law due diligence for products supplied to Israel's defense sector. GE's board recommends voting against the proposal, citing concerns about business impact and the focus on Israel. GE Aerospace, part of NYSE:GE, supplies aviation and defense technology to...
